text:
Change has been successfully rebased and submitted as 3a6b4e23ffda948edfdb87d0c0544399927eeda3 3 is the latest approved patch-set. The change was submitted with unreviewed changes in the following files: ``` The name of the file: docs/dawn/features/subgroup_matrix.md Insertions: 6, Deletions: 6. @@ -1021,7 +1021,7 @@

C is a zero value matrix matching the result type - simdgroup_matrix_multiply + simdgroup_multiply @@ -1031,7 +1031,7 @@

Cooperative matrix operands must include signed values appropriately based on operand types - simdgroup_matrix_multiply_accumulate + simdgroup_multiply_accumulate @@ -1039,7 +1039,7 @@ OpI/FAdd with composite constructed scalar - simdgroup_matrix_multiply_accumulate with identity matrix for b and filled matrix scalar value for c + simdgroup_multiply_accumulate with identity matrix for b and filled matrix scalar value for c @@ -1047,7 +1047,7 @@ OpI/FSub with composite constructed scalar - simdgroup_matrix_multiply_accumulate with diagonal matrix for b and filled inverted matrix scalar value for c + simdgroup_multiply_accumulate with diagonal matrix for b and filled inverted matrix scalar value for c @@ -1055,7 +1055,7 @@ OpI/FMul with composite constructed scalar or OpMatrixTimesScalar (for float components) - simdgroup_matrix_multiply with diagonal matrix scalar value for b1 + simdgroup_multiply with diagonal matrix scalar value for b1 @@ -1063,7 +1063,7 @@ OpU/S/FDiv with composite constructed scalar or OpMatrixTimesScalar (for float components with reciprocal scalar value) - simdgroup_matrix_multiply with diagonal matrix reciprocal scalar value for b1 + simdgroup_multiply with diagonal matrix reciprocal scalar value for b1 ```
